diffs.diff:
--- a/predict.py
+++ b/predict.py
@@ -56,12 +56,19 @@
     return rgba

 

 

+def render_view(model, scene_code, c2w, device):

+    rays_o, rays_d = get_rays_for_c2w(c2w, H=256, W=256, fovy_deg=40.0, device=device)

+    with torch.no_grad():

+        img_t = model.renderer(model.decoder, scene_code, rays_o, rays_d)

+    return img_t

+

+

 def main():

     parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()

     parser.add_argument('--data_path', required=True)

     parser.add_argument('--checkpoint', default=None)

     parser.add_argument('--output', required=True)

-    parser.add_argument('--mode', default='world')

+    parser.add_argument('--mode', default='neg_az')

     args = parser.parse_args()

 

     device = 'cuda' if torch.cuda.is_available() else 'cpu'

@@ -76,7 +83,8 @@
         config_name="config.yaml",

         weight_name="model.ckpt",

     )

-    model.renderer.set_chunk_size(131072)

+    # Try smaller chunk to avoid mismatch

+    model.renderer.set_chunk_size(8192)

     model.to(device)

 

     data_path = Path(args.data_path)

@@ -139,13 +147,19 @@
                     raise ValueError(args.mode)

 

                 try:

-                    rays_o, rays_d = get_rays_for_c2w(final_c2w, H=256, W=256, fovy_deg=40.0, device=device)

-                    with torch.no_grad():

-                        img_t = model.renderer(model.decoder, scene_code, rays_o, rays_d)

+                    img_t = render_view(model, scene_code, final_c2w, device)

                     rgba = tensor_to_rgba(img_t)

                     Image.fromarray(rgba, mode='RGBA').save(out_obj_dir / f"view_{vid:02d}.png")

                 except Exception as e:

-                    print(f"Render failed {uid} view {vid}: {e}", flush=True)

+                    # Retry with even smaller chunk

+                    try:

+                        model.renderer.set_chunk_size(2048)

+                        img_t = render_view(model, scene_code, final_c2w, device)

+                        rgba = tensor_to_rgba(img_t)

+                        Image.fromarray(rgba, mode='RGBA').save(out_obj_dir / f"view_{vid:02d}.png")

+                        model.renderer.set_chunk_size(8192)

+                    except Exception as e2:

+                        print(f"Render failed {uid} view {vid}: {e2}", flush=True)

         except Exception as e:

             print(f"Object failed {uid}: {e}", flush=True)

             traceback.print_exc()
